recommendations.title: Ape vs Mecha Ape

recommendations.title: Stay Alive
recommendations.overview: After the brutal death of a friend, a group of friends find themselves in possession of a video-game called "Stay Alive," a blood-curdling true story of a 17th century noblewoman known as the Blood Countess. After playing the game when they know they

recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: The boyfriend of an abducted woman never gives up the search as the abductor looks on.

recommendations.title: And Soon the Darkness
recommendations.overview: Two young English women go on a cycling tour of the French countryside. When one of them goes missing, the other begins to search for her. But who can she trust?

recommendations.title: Vampyros Lesbos
recommendations.overview: An erotic horror tale about a vixen vampiress seducing and killing women to appease her insatiable thirst for female blood.

recommendations.title: Bingo Bongo
recommendations.overview: The ape-man, found somewhere in the jungles of Congo, transferred to Milan and named Bingo Bongo. The only one who believes in the human qualities of him is Laura, a woman anthropologist , so their affection for each other even grows to love.

recommendations.title: The Night Caller

recommendations.title: Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes
recommendations.overview: Several generations following Caesar's reign, apes – now the dominant species – live harmoniously while humans have been reduced to living in the shadows. As a new tyrannical ape leader builds his empire, one young ape undertakes a harrowing journey

recommendations.title: Greystoke: The Legend of Tarzan, Lord of the Apes

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.
